title: Fig. 3 in Impact of chemoprophylaxis immunisation under halofantrine (CPS-HF) drug cover in Plasmodium yoelii Swiss mice malaria model
author: Adnan, Arif Jamal Siddiqui Jyoti Bhardwaj Walid Sabri Hamadou Manish Goyal Sadaf Jahan Syed Amir Ashraf Arshad Jamal Pankaj Sharma Manojkumar Sachidanandan Riadh Badraoui Mejdi Snoussi Mohd
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Determination of pre-erythrocytic liver stage burden of Plasmodium yoelii (Killick-Kendrick, 1967) after CPS-HF prophylaxis. To evaluate the parasite burden in control sporozoite-infected (HF untreated, n = 5) and sporozoite-infected, HF drug-treated mice (n = 5) from each sequential CPS-HF cycle (1st to 6th challenge) were assessed via Real-time PCR by calculating the relative fold change of the Py18S rRNA gene normalised to the mouse housekeeping gene (GAPDH). The y-axis shows mean ± SD (n = 5) values of Py18S rRNA copy numbers. Statistical significances between different groups were determined using student's t-test (indicates *** P <0.001, ** P <0.01 and ns P> 0.05).

Statistical significances between different groups were determined using student's t-test (indicates *** P <0.001, ** P <0.01 and ns P> 0.05).
